name: codebase-onboarding
description: Audits an existing codebase and maps its architecture. Gets agents up to speed fast on any inherited code.

tasks.title: Audit codebase and document architecture
tasks.description: Read the existing codebase, map the architecture, identify tech debt hotspots and test coverage gaps. Document findings in docs/CODEBASE-AUDIT.md. Create follow-up issues for cleanup opportunities.
